note: Example configuration for Android devices (tablets, phones) using Termux

storage.note: Android typically uses bridge to /mnt/user-data/outputs for cross-device sync

android_specifics.vold_lag: May need retry logic on cold start (vold daemon lag)
android_specifics.ghost_handles: Stale file handles after app kill - restart Termux if issues

git_workflow.recommended: Clone private repo in Termux home, work there, push to remote

customization_notes.paths: Platform_Home location may vary - update claude_home to match your setup
customization_notes.sdcard: External storage at /sdcard - use for large files, not active work
customization_notes.git: Install in Termux: pkg install git python
customization_notes.ollama: Usually not run on Android - update endpoint if accessing remote Ollama
